rationale: Career consists entirely of non-technical roles (customer support at Wipro, sales, HR management) with fictional companies (Initech, Wayne Enterprises) and zero ML or engineering experience despite listing BentoML as an advanced skill.

Built production embedding-based recommendation system with sentence-transformers for 10M+ users at Rephrase.ai (AI startup) and shipped XGBoost/LightGBM ranking models at Zoho, with expert-level Vector Search skills directly matching the JD's core requirements for hybrid retrieval and learning-to-rank.

Career is primarily frontend/backend/DevOps work across IT-services firms (Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture) with no production ML or IR experience; Vector Search skill listed but not substantiated by any actual ranking or retrieval work in their career history.

Entire 13.9-year career is in non-technical roles (HR Manager, Civil Engineer, Business Analyst, Marketing Manager) at fictional companies (Pied Piper, Initech) with no engineering or ML foundation; recent online RAG courses do not constitute production experience.

Only 2.7 years of experience entirely in IT-services firms (Tech Mahindra, HCL) doing frontend/mobile development with no production ML or IR work; RAG side project mentioned in summary does not substitute for the required production retrieval/ranking experience.

Has Milvus (vector DB) as an advanced skill and a Java developer stint at Flipkart (product company), but the majority of 8.1-year career is consulting/IT-services work (Accenture, Mphasis) in web/backend roles with no demonstrated production IR or ranking system ownership.

Career is entirely in non-technical operations and project management roles at Acme Corp and Dunder Mifflin (fictional company), with no engineering or ML experience; Kubeflow listed as advanced skill is not supported by any technical role in their history.

11.4-year career spans only non-technical roles — customer support, content writing, graphic design, business analysis — including positions at fictional company Dunder Mifflin, with zero engineering or ML experience.

Only 1.6 years of experience as a Sales Executive at fictional Wayne Enterprises with a marketing/operations background and no engineering or ML work; Object Detection listed as an advanced skill is inconsistent with their entire career history.

Strong educational pedigree (IIT Kanpur B.Sc) and 7.9 years of software engineering experience, but career is primarily test automation (CRED) and full-stack web development (Accenture consulting) with no demonstrated production ML, retrieval, or ranking system experience despite LlamaIndex listed as top skill.
